rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CRONIN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Volkswagen Group Of America, Inc'S Motion To Compel Release Of Decedent'S Pathology Material For Tissue Digestion Analysis
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America¿s motion to compel release of decedent¿s pathology material for tissue digestion analysis is granted conditioned on 1) 50% of each sample provided to a person designated by plaintiffs¿ counsel within 7 business days after each cut is made; and 2) the testing be completed within 45 days after defendant¿s receipt of the pathology material. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Compel Defendant General Electric Companys Further Responses To Plaintiffs Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production Of Documents; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant General Electric Co.¿s further responses to special interrogatories and requests for production, and for sanctions is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT LAWRENCE LEVENE VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion Of Defendant Mccord Corporation To Compel Further Responses To Its Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. DEFENDANT MCCORD CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Its Special Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Admissions And Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions is continued to November 9, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID J. PALOMARES VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Compel Defendant Clayton Industries Deposition And Production Of Documents Or Tangible Things
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 4. PLAINTIFF DAVID PALOMARES's Motion to Compel Defendant Clayton Industries Deposition And Production Of Documents Or Tangible Things is continued to December 2, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
